movie.actors: Kurt McKinney, Jean-Claude Van Damme, J.W. Fails, Kathie Sileno
movie.plot: Jason Stillwell, a Bruce Lee fan, is beaten numerous times and trains from the ghost of Lee. Jason then must use his newly acquired skills to save Seattle from a crime syndicate, whose top martial artist is the deadly Ivan.
movie.title: No Retreat, No Surrender
movie.writer: See-Yuen Ng (original story), Corey Yuen (original story), Keith W. Strandberg (screenplay)
